scope: Verify Leolity's ability to correctly display a user's list of saved and applied jobs when requested via chat.

testCases.title: Verify 'Applied Jobs' List Retrieval - Positive Case
steps: Navigate to https://leolity-qa.goarya.com/demo-staffing/home
Initiate a chat with Leolity.
Type 'What jobs have I applied for?' and send the message.
Verify the chatbot responds with a list of applied jobs.
testCases.expectedResult: The chatbot displays a clear and accurate list of jobs the user has applied for. The list should match the jobs visible in the 'Applied Jobs' section of the careersite.

testCases.title: Verify 'Saved Jobs' List Retrieval - Positive Case
steps: Navigate to https://leolity-qa.goarya.com/demo-staffing/home
Initiate a chat with Leolity.
Type 'What jobs have I saved?' and send the message.
Verify the chatbot responds with a list of saved jobs.
testCases.expectedResult: The chatbot displays a clear and accurate list of jobs the user has saved. The list should match the jobs visible in the 'Saved Jobs' section of the careersite.

testCases.title: Verify No Jobs Applied/Saved - Negative Case
steps: Navigate to https://leolity-qa.goarya.com/demo-staffing/home
Initiate a chat with Leolity.
Ensure no jobs are saved or applied for.
Type 'What jobs have I applied for?' and send the message.
Type 'What jobs have I saved?' and send the message.
testCases.expectedResult: The chatbot responds with a message indicating that no jobs have been applied for or saved, respectively. The message should be user-friendly and informative.

testCases.title: Verify Handling of Ambiguous Query - Edge Case
steps: Navigate to https://leolity-qa.goarya.com/demo-staffing/home
Initiate a chat with Leolity.
Type 'My jobs?' and send the message.
Verify the chatbot's response.
testCases.expectedResult: The chatbot should either ask for clarification (e.g., 'Do you mean applied jobs or saved jobs?') or attempt to provide both lists. The response should not be an error or a generic 'I don't understand' message.

testCases.title: Verify List Display with Large Number of Jobs - Edge Case
steps: Navigate to https://leolity-qa.goarya.com/demo-staffing/home
Initiate a chat with Leolity.
Apply/Save a significant number of jobs (e.g., 20+).
Type 'What jobs have I applied for?' and send the message.
Type 'What jobs have I saved?' and send the message.
testCases.expectedResult: The chatbot displays the complete list of applied/saved jobs without errors or performance issues. The list should be paginated or scrollable if necessary to accommodate the large number of entries. The UI should remain responsive.
